queries: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries FROM events;

case.question: Сколько раз кормили грудью за всё время?

response.answer: За всё время кормили грудью 143 раза.

queries: WITH feedings AS (SELECT occurred_at, LAG(occurred_at) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS prev_at FROM events WHERE type = 'feed_breast'), sessions AS (SELECT occurred_at, SUM(CASE WHEN prev_at IS NULL OR occurred_at - prev_at > INTERVAL '30 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS session_id FROM feedings) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS feeding_count FROM sessions;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') = '2026-05-10';

case.question: Сколько всего записей было за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026?

response.answer: За неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026 было всего 40 записей.

queries: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries FROM events WHERE occurred_at >= '2026-05-11 00:00:00+03' AND occurred_at < '2026-05-18 00:00:00+03';

case.question: Покажи статистику количества записей по дням за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026.

response.answer: За неделю с 11 по 17 мая 2026 года в дневнике записаны события только за 11 мая (40 событий). На остальные дни недели (12–17 мая) не найдено записей.

queries: SELECT DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM events WHERE DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN '2026-05-11' AND '2026-05-17' GROUP BY local_day ORDER BY local_day;

queries: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM events WHERE occurred_at >= '2026-05-11 00:00:00+03' AND occurred_at < '2026-05-18 00:00:00+03';

case.question: В какой день за неделю с 11 мая 2026 по 17 мая 2026 было больше всего записей и сколько?

case.question: На прошлой неделе, с 4 мая 2026 по 10 мая 2026, в какой день было больше всего стула и сколько раз?

response.answer: На прошлой неделе, с 4 мая 2026 по 10 мая 2026, больше всего стула было 8 мая 2026 — в этот день произошло 2 события.

queries: SELECT DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day, COUNT(*) AS poo_count FROM events WHERE type = 'diaper' AND (payload->>'kind') IN ('poo', 'both') AND DATE(occurred_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') BETWEEN '2026-05-04' AND '2026-05-10' GROUP BY local_day ORDER BY poo_count DESC LIMIT 1;

queries: WITH feedings AS (SELECT occurred_at, LAG(occurred_at) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS prev_at FROM events WHERE type IN ('feed_breast', 'feed_bottle')), sessions AS (SELECT occurred_at, SUM(CASE WHEN prev_at IS NULL OR occurred_at - prev_at > INTERVAL '30 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY occurred_at) AS session_id FROM feedings) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS feeding_count FROM sessions;

case.question: Сколько всего снов получилось и сколько минут сна суммарно, если считать пробуждением следующую запись после засыпания, а пробуждение без засыпания считать с предыдущей записи?

response.answer: Всего получилось 152 сна, суммарно ребёнок спал 11272 минуты.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type NOT IN ('sleep_start', 'note') ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE ((p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) AND p.type <> 'note') ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)), inferred_sleeps AS (SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM start_based_sleeps UNION ALL SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM sleep_end_without_start) SELECT COUNT(*) AS sleep_count, ROUND(SUM(duration_min))::INTEGER AS total_sleep_minutes FROM inferred_sleeps;

case.question: Если отдельно посчитать только дополнительные пробуждения без записанного засыпания, исключив sleep_end, которые уже были пробуждением для sleep_start, сколько таких дополнительных снов и минут сна получится от предыдущей не-note записи?

response.answer: Дополнительных пробуждений без записанного засыпания получилось 41. Общая длительность сна по этим событиям составляет 3843 минуты.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type NOT IN ('sleep_start', 'note') ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE ((p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) AND p.type <> 'note') ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)) SELECT COUNT(*) AS additional_sleep_count, ROUND(SUM(duration_min))::INTEGER AS total_additional_minutes FROM sleep_end_without_start;

case.question: В среднем сколько минут сна в день получается по дням, где есть записи сна?

response.answer: В среднем получается 805 минут сна в день по дням, где есть записи сна.

queries: WITH start_based_sleeps AS (SELECT s.id, s.occurred_at AS started_at, wake.id AS wake_event_id, wake.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events s CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index FROM events e WHERE (e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at OR (e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index)) AND e.type NOT IN ('sleep_start', 'note') ORDER BY e.occurred_at ASC, CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT 1) wake WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'), sleep_end_without_start AS (SELECT e.id, previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at, e.id AS wake_event_id, e.occurred_at AS woke_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM events e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index FROM events p WHERE ((p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at OR (p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index)) AND p.type <> 'note') ORDER BY p.occurred_at DESC, CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1) previous_event WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end' AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id)), inferred_sleeps AS (SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM start_based_sleeps UNION ALL SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM sleep_end_without_start), daily AS (SELECT DATE(started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_day, SUM(duration_min) AS sleep_minutes FROM inferred_sleeps GROUP BY local_day) SELECT ROUND(AVG(sleep_minutes))::INTEGER AS average_sleep_minutes_per_day FROM daily;

case.question: В среднем сколько минут сна в месяц получается по месяцам, где есть записи сна?

response.answer: В среднем получается 5636 минут сна в месяц.

queries:
WITH start_based_sleeps AS (
  SELECT
    s.id AS id,
    s.occurred_at AS started_at,
    wake.id AS wake_event_id,
    wake.occurred_at AS woke_at,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (wake.occurred_at - s.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min
  FROM events s
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT e.id, e.occurred_at, e.source_event_index
    FROM events e
    WHERE (
        e.occurred_at > s.occurred_at
        OR (
          e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at
          AND e.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_chat_id
          AND e.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.source_message_id
          AND e.source_event_index > s.source_event_index
        )
      )
      AND e.type NOT IN ('sleep_start', 'note')
    ORDER BY
      e.occurred_at ASC,
      CASE WHEN e.occurred_at = s.occurred_at THEN e.source_event_index ELSE 0 END ASC,
      e.id ASC
    LIMIT 1
  ) wake
  WHERE s.type = 'sleep_start'
),
sleep_end_without_start AS (
  SELECT
    e.id AS id,
    previous_event.occurred_at AS started_at,
    e.id AS wake_event_id,
    e.occurred_at AS woke_at,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.occurred_at - previous_event.occurred_at)) / 60.0 AS duration_min
  FROM events e
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT p.id, p.occurred_at, p.type, p.source_event_index
    FROM events p
    WHERE (
        (
          p.occurred_at < e.occurred_at
          OR (
            p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at
            AND p.source_chat_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_chat_id
            AND p.source_message_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM e.source_message_id
            AND p.source_event_index < e.source_event_index
          )
        )
        AND p.type <> 'note'
      )
    ORDER BY
      p.occurred_at DESC,
      CASE WHEN p.occurred_at = e.occurred_at THEN p.source_event_index ELSE 32767 END DESC,
      p.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) previous_event
  WHERE e.type = 'sleep_end'
    AND previous_event.type <> 'sleep_start'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM start_based_sleeps counted WHERE counted.wake_event_id = e.id
    )
),
inferred_sleeps AS (
  SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM start_based_sleeps
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, started_at, wake_event_id, woke_at, duration_min FROM sleep_end_without_start
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS local_month,
         SUM(duration_min) AS sleep_minutes
  FROM inferred_sleeps
  GROUP BY local_month
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(sleep_minutes))::INTEGER AS average_sleep_minutes_per_month
FROM monthly;
